title: UserMode
text: UserMode Specifies the setting of the ambient UserMode property for all OCXs in a Uniface application. UserMode = DESIGN | RUN Arguments DESIGN —UserMode for all OCXs is false. The control instance is in a design-time instance of its container, which may have different behavior than the runtime version. RUN —UserMode is true. The control instance is in a running application, so functional behavior is defined by the OCX control. Default value None File section [ocx] Description If this setting is not specified, the setting for the ambient UserMode depends on how the application is started: If the form component is run within the Uniface IDE, UserMode is false . In all other cases (including ide.exe /tst ), UserMode is true . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
